response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his background is heavily skewed toward high-level scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js) and Dlang, with limited evidence of focused C++ development, especially in industrial automation or high-performance systems. While he demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills, his security expertise (IEC 62443) is not clearly documented, and his cloud/industrial automation exposure is minimal.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and architectural design skills demonstrated across diverse projects
Experience with high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling) and multi-threaded programming
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ and STL in industrial automation or on-premises/cloud platform solutions
No documented experience with secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
Minimal exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure)
